---
title: "Educational Programs"
subtitle: "Immersive learning experiences for technology enthusiasts"
description: "Explore our educational programs including hackathons, summer schools, and specialized training events designed for hands-on learning and skill development."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Educational <span class="gr">Programs</span></h1>
    <p>Hackathons, summer schools, and community meetups. Learn by building.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROGRAM CARDS — dark image style like Events page -->
<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Our programs</h2>
    <p class="sub">Immersive experiences that go beyond traditional learning.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.jpg" alt="Hackathons">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <h3>Hackathons</h3>
              <p>48-hour challenges in cybersecurity, AI ethics, and space tech. Real problems, real teams.</p>
              <span class="m-lk">Explore hackathons</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/programs/summer-school/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.jpg" alt="Summer School">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <h3>Summer School</h3>
              <p>Multi-week intensive programs combining lectures, workshops, and project work.</p>
              <span class="m-lk">Discover summer school</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/programs/computerclub/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.jpg" alt="Computer Club">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <h3>Computer Club</h3>
              <p>Monthly meetups for coding, hacking, and building together. All levels welcome.</p>
              <span class="m-lk">Join the club</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE ROW -->
<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.jpg" alt="Collaborative learning"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Learn faster<br>by building together.</h2>
        <p>Our programs put you in teams with peers and mentors, working on real challenges under real deadlines. It's the fastest way to build skills that stick — and a network that lasts.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/academy/events.html" class="m-lk">See upcoming events</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- UPCOMING PROGRAMS — clean list -->
<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container" style="max-width: 750px;">
    <h2>Upcoming</h2>
    <p class="sub">Register early — spots fill fast.</p>

    <div class="up-item">
      <div style="flex-grow:1;">
        <h4><a href="/academy/programs/computerclub/">Computer Club</a></h4>
        <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Monthly &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova & Online</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Ongoing</div>
    </div>

    <div class="up-item">
      <div style="flex-grow:1;">
        <h4><a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/ai-ethics-hackathon.html">AI Ethics Hackathon</a></h4>
        <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> March 5, 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bucharest</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Open</div>
    </div>

    <div class="up-item">
      <div style="flex-grow:1;">
        <h4><a href="/academy/programs/summer-school/2025.html">Summer School 2026</a></h4>
        <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Aug 1–15, 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-badge up-badge-soon">Coming soon</div>
    </div>

    <div class="up-item">
      <div style="flex-grow:1;">
        <h4><a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/challenge-2025.html">SpaceApps Challenge 2026</a></h4>
        <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> October 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-badge up-badge-soon">Coming soon</div>
    </div>

    <div class="up-item">
      <div style="flex-grow:1;">
        <h4><a href="/academy/programs/summer-school/junior.html">Junior Summer School</a></h4>
        <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> July 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-badge up-badge-soon">Coming soon</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- BENEFITS — clean tiles -->
<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Why join a program</h2>
    <p class="sub"></p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>Collaborative</h3><p>Work alongside peers and experts to solve real problems together.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lightning"></i><h3>Accelerated</h3><p>Intensive formats that build practical skills in days, not months.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i><h3>Career-building</h3><p>Real projects for your portfolio and a network that opens doors.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Ready to join?</h2>
    <p>Browse programs or book a call to discuss custom events for your team.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/academy/events.html" class="m-b">See all events</a>
      <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-bo">Book a consultation</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
